text:

From-To: feedback->open

Ok, I've give up. The patch isn't applied cleanly: Patching file 
pkg-plist using Plan A...npatch: **** malformed patch at line 5855: @@ 
-2882,21 +3333,131 @@n and there is more after I fixing that one. 
Please recheck your patch and submit it as an attachment (not inline as 
you did last time) or upload it to pastebin for example. Thank you!
